title: HQG Dashboard
description: An internal web platform for the Husky Quantitative Group / UConn. It provides a unified interface for managing live portfolios.

title: Environmental Temp/Light ADC
description: Designed and constructed an analog-to-digital converter using op-amps to provide a visual representation of environmental conditions.

title: Stock Buddy
description: A web platform that provides real-time stock data and news.

title: Wireless Audio Reciever/Transmitter
description: A wireless optical audio transmitter and receiver system designed to transmit audio signals up to 200 feet using lasers and solar cells. Includes adjustable gain and microphone/aux inputs.

title: Sprig
description: A mini game console built on a custom PCBusing a Raspberry Pi Pico and a 4-button input system. Runs games written in JavaScript.

title: Blot
description: Plotting bot using 2 axis stepper motors and a pen to create physical drawings from digital instructions.

title: AI Air Traffic Control
description: Prototyped and pitched an AI-driven Air Traffic Control System that converts and transcribes audio, minimizing auditory miscommunication.

title: Electronic Stylophone
description: Constructed a battery powered stylophone by soldering surface mounted electronic components onto a custom PCB and implemented controls for adjustable volume and pitch.
